philosophy.primaryObjective: Buy premium collector cards below market value. Prioritize liquidity, collector demand, and long-term scarcity. Focus on cornerstone cards rather than quantity.
philosophy.purchaseRule: Prefer acquisitions at 8-15% below market. No FOMO purchases. Patience is part of the strategy.
portfolioFocus: Premium Eeveelution cards — Umbreon, Sylveon, Glaceon, Leafeon
Premium Pikachu cards — TG and GG variants
Premium Charizard exposure — TG and sealed
Select sealed products at retail price only
avoid: Random illustration rares of non-popular Pokemon
Most modern ex cards without proven collector demand
Cards that have recently experienced rapid speculative price spikes
Any card above the 8-15% below market entry rule
FOMO purchases at launch week prices

goals.title: Acquire Umbreon V TG22/TG30 — Brilliant Stars
goals.detail: Purchased at 4229 pesos all-in including shipping. Approximately 9 percent below local market. Strong entry. Up +35 percent in 30 days globally. Hold — no reason to sell.

goals.title: Acquire Charizard TG03/TG30 — Lost Origin
goals.detail: First major singles investment. Cost basis 1870 pesos. Up approximately 11-18 percent unrealized. Hold — Charizard demand is permanent.

goals.title: Build Chaos Rising sealed position
goals.detail: Holding 1 booster bundle at 1999 pesos, 2 blisters at 1276 each, 1 Perfect Order blister at 1276. Total sealed: 5827 pesos. Hold minimum 6 months — do not crack.

goals.title: Acquire Lucario VSTAR SWSH291 — Black Star Promo
goals.detail: Purchased at 811 pesos total including shipping. Below local Collectr market of 865 pesos. Long-term hold — Lucario demand supported by Mega Evolution block hype in 2026.

goals.title: Acquire Pikachu V TG16/TG30 — Lost Origin
goals.detail: Premium Pikachu position. Out-of-print Trainer Gallery. Most universal buyer pool in PH. Complements existing Umbreon V TG22 position.
goals.rule: Buy only at 8-15 percent below market. Do not pay above 7200 pesos.

goals.title: Acquire Glaceon VSTAR GG40/GG70 — Crown Zenith GG
goals.detail: Premium Eeveelution. Crown Zenith GG is fully out of print. Up +13 percent in 30 days. Strong long-term hold candidate alongside Umbreon V.
goals.rule: Must be at least 10 percent below market. Prefer discount over urgency.

goals.title: Acquire Leafeon VSTAR GG35/GG70 — Crown Zenith GG
goals.detail: Premium Eeveelution. Currently down -14.8 percent in 30 days — dip buy opportunity. Crown Zenith GG out of print. Same investment thesis as Glaceon.
goals.rule: Must be at least 10 percent below market. Currently in a dip — favorable entry window.

goals.title: Pre-order Pitch Black ETB at retail
goals.detail: Release July 17 2026. Mega Darkrai ex is the chase card. JP Abyss Eye sealed already trading 30 percent above Chaos Rising equivalents. Buy at retail 2500-3000 pesos only — never above MSRP.
goals.rule: Retail price only. No FOMO launch week buys on singles.

goals.title: Pre-order 30th Celebration ETB at retail
goals.detail: Release September 16 2026. Most important release of 2026. First-ever simultaneous worldwide release. All-foil packs, new rarity, Pikachu and Mewtwo and Mew. Pre-order the moment slots open — likely July or August 2026.
goals.rule: MSRP only. Pre-order before launch — do not buy at secondary market prices.

goals.title: Offload weak singles — recover dead capital
goals.detail: List on Facebook B/S groups: Patrat, Pignite, Tympole, Sewaddle, Swadloon, McD promos, Naganadel GX, Solgaleo GX, Electrike, Bibarel, Yanma, Clamperl, Shedinja. Target: recover 2000-3000 pesos to redeploy.
goals.rule: Accept break-even or slight loss. Capital recovery is the goal.

goals.title: Umbreon and Darkrai GX Tag Team — Unified Minds
goals.detail: Not actively hunting. Buy only if significantly below market. PSA 10 sold $599 in December 2025. Best grading upside in the 5K-7K range. Inspect all corners before buying.
goals.rule: Minimum 15 percent below market. Only if condition is NM.

goals.title: Reshiram and Charizard GX Tag Team
goals.detail: Not actively hunting. Strong Charizard plus Reshiram pairing. Tag Team era fully out of print. Buy only if significantly discounted from market.

goals.title: Save toward Palkia VSTAR GG67 — Crown Zenith GG
goals.detail: Lowest-entry card in the fast-moving GG tier. Up +12.8 percent in 30 days. Part of the Creation trio. Need 7000-8000 pesos budget. Build toward this using profits from offloaded singles.
goals.rule: Save toward this — do not rush. Buy only when budget allows without compromising Priority 1-3 targets.

holdings.reason: Blue-chip. Charizard TG (TG03) is the strongest card you own — flagged as a PSA grading candidate (raw ~₱2,090 → ₱6,000+ graded). Keep long-term.

Per sealed rules: hold blisters 3+ months, sell trigger +30% (₱1,700–1,900). Watch for reprint news.
Per sealed rules: hold 6+ months, sell half at +50% (₱3,000), hold the rest 12+ months.

holdings.card: Sealed Perfect Order Sleeved Blister Packs
holdings.reason: Per sealed rules: hold 6–18 months. Mega Evo block early sets up 20–40%; target ₱1,700–2,100.

watchlist.name: Giratina VSTAR
watchlist.notes: King of the GG set. Up +64.6% in 30 days as of May 2026. 6th most trending card globally. Way over ₱5K budget but the card to aim for long-term.

watchlist.name: Origin Forme Palkia VSTAR
watchlist.notes: Up +12.8% in 30 days. Lowest-entry card in the 'actually moving' tier of GG. Save to ₱8–10K budget then buy this. Part of the God trio with Dialga and Giratina.

watchlist.name: Regigigas VSTAR
watchlist.notes: Best GG card accessible within ₱5K budget. Out-of-print set. Slow grower but steady. Pair with Cynthia's Ambition for a ~₱4,100 combined GG play.

watchlist.name: Cynthia's Ambition
watchlist.notes: Trainer supporter card. Cynthia is one of the most beloved characters in the franchise — GG trainer cards are underpriced vs Pokémon cards. Sleeper pick. Pairs with Regigigas for ~₱4,100 combined.

watchlist.name: Umbreon V
watchlist.notes: Best TG buy within ₱5K budget. Umbreon has one of the deepest fan bases in Pokémon. Accessible entry point vs the ₱30,000+ Evolving Skies Umbreon VMAX Alt Art. Liquidly sellable in PH.

watchlist.name: Pikachu VMAX
watchlist.notes: The top TG card from Lost Origin. Pikachu + VMAX treatment. Far out of ₱5K range but the TG card to save toward after GG67.

watchlist.name: Pikachu
watchlist.notes: Last card in the TG set — collectors chasing full TG sets need this. Pikachu demand is eternal. Liquidly sellable in PH. Good complement to TG03 Charizard already in portfolio.

watchlist.name: Mega Greninja ex SIR
watchlist.notes: The #1 chase card of 2026 so far. Mega Evo block SIRs have opened at $100+ day-one and hit $400+ within months. If pulled from sealed Chaos Rising product — DO NOT sell immediately. Hold 2–3 months minimum. If buying raw from PH seller, target under ₱6,000.

watchlist.name: Sylveon ex / Espeon ex SIR
watchlist.notes: Eeveelution collector demand is permanent. Prismatic Evolutions is stable post-release. Look for PH sellers with extras at near-market price. Slow grower but low risk.

sealedRules.riskNote: Sell half at +50% (₱3,000). Hold rest 12+ months. Watch for reprint announcements.
Crack one at 3 months if needed. Hold one sealed 12+ months. Sell trigger per blister: ₱1,700–1,900.
Hold 6–18 months. Mega Evo block early sets up 20–40%. Target ₱1,700–2,100.

avoidList: Random Art Rares of non-popular Pokémon (Patrat, Pignite, Yanma, Clamperl, Shedinja, Electrike, Bibarel)
Legacy GX cards from Sun & Moon era — soft market, low growth
Booster bundles as a long-term investment format — worst sealed ROI
Buying sealed at scalper prices right at launch — wait 4–8 weeks for price correction
Any card where you cannot name 3 PH buyers who would want it
buyChecklist: Is the Pokémon one of: Charizard, Greninja, Gardevoir, Gengar, Mewtwo, Pikachu, Eevee line, Lucario, Umbreon, Rayquaza?
Is the rarity GG, TG, SIR, or IR (not common/uncommon)?
Is the set still live or within 12 months of release?
Is the price at or below US market price in PHP equivalent?
Can you name 3 PH buyers who would want this right now?
Do you have a clear exit plan (flip in 3mo / hold 12mo / specific buyer)?
generalNotes: GG set is fully out of print — any GG card is a patient long-term hold
Mega Evolution block (Ascended Heroes, Perfect Order, Chaos Rising) is the hottest block in modern TCG as of mid-2026
PH local prices typically run 5–20% above US market — factor this into cost basis
Sealed sell thresholds: +30% for blisters, +50% for bundles, +100% for ETBs and boxes
If pulled from sealed: never sell a chase SIR immediately — minimum 2–3 month hold
PSA grading Charizard TG03 could turn ₱2,090 raw into ₱6,000+ graded — consider when budget allows
